doctorNote.title: Doctor Tray Preference
doctorNote.detail: Dr. Chen wants articulating paper, cotton pliers, and the mirror visible together before she checks distal clearance.

items.name: Mirror, explorer, cotton pliers
items.detail: Mirror face up, explorer nested under it, cotton pliers loaded for quick cord transfer.
items.note: This lane should be the first thing visible when the doctor sits.

items.name: High-speed handpiece
items.detail: Water spray checked, swivel loose, tubing rotated left for bur swaps without crossing the field.
items.note: Keep this lane clear for continuous crown-prep bur changes.

items.name: Crown prep bur block
items.detail: 856-016 taper, coarse chamfer, and fine chamfer lined in working order for prep to finish.
items.note: Doctor expects the next bur already indexed, not hunted for.

items.name: 00 cord, Hemodent, cotton pellets
items.detail: Primary cord is up, but backup hemostatic and second cord segment are not yet opened.
items.note: This lane is usable now, but not safe for a second pass.

items.name: Articulating paper
items.detail: Pulled forward before contact break so Dr. Chen can verify distal clearance without pausing.
items.note: Do not bury this behind the bur block.

items.name: Light-body VPS backup set
items.detail: Backup impression cartridge and tips are not on the tray, leaving no immediate fallback if scan capture fails.
items.note: This is a real seat risk, not a cosmetic miss.

setupChecklist.title: Barrier and operatory line check
setupChecklist.detail: Light handles, suction, and bracket tray are sealed and dry before the patient is seated.

setupChecklist.title: Crown prep bur sequence staged
setupChecklist.detail: Handpiece lane, bur block, mirror lane, and suction path are arranged for continuous prep flow.

setupChecklist.title: Doctor-specific preference set
setupChecklist.detail: Articulating paper and cotton pliers are up before distal wall refinement starts.

setupChecklist.title: Capture backup verified
setupChecklist.detail: Scan backup material must be on tray or explicitly cleared with the doctor before seating.

confirmation.title: Release Tray to Room
confirmation.detail: Do not release this tray as seat-ready until the bur sequence, doctor preference items, and backup capture path are all confirmed.
